mapper.sql: waiver_id, subject_id, tenant_id, initiator_user_id, requested_ratio, party_pool_size, total_eligible_size, reason_text, reason_evidence_keys, status, committee_approver, committee_approval_at, committee_opinion, street_approver, street_approval_at, street_opinion, applied_at, local_payload_hash, local_payload_locked_at, blockchain_tx_hash, blockchain_chain_provider, chain_attest_status, chain_attest_attempts, chain_attest_last_error, chain_confirmed_at, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_party_ratio_waiver WHERE waiver_id = #{waiverId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM t_party_ratio_waiver WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND status IN (1, 2, 3, 4) ORDER BY waiver_id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_party_ratio_waiver ( subject_id, tenant_id, initiator_user_id, requested_ratio, party_pool_size, total_eligible_size, reason_text, reason_evidence_keys, status, committee_approver, committee_approval_at, committee_opinion, street_approver, street_approval_at, street_opinion, applied_at, local_payload_hash, local_payload_locked_at, blockchain_tx_hash, blockchain_chain_provider, chain_attest_status, chain_attest_attempts, chain_attest_last_error, chain_confirmed_at, version ) VALUES ( #{subjectId}, #{tenantId}, #{initiatorUserId}, #{requestedRatio}, #{partyPoolSize}, #{totalEligibleSize}, #{reasonText}, #{reasonEvidenceKeys}, #{status}, #{committeeApprover}, #{committeeApprovalAt}, #{committeeOpinion}, #{streetApprover}, #{streetApprovalAt}, #{streetOpinion}, #{appliedAt}, #{localPayloadHash}, #{localPayloadLockedAt}, #{blockchainTxHash}, #{blockchainChainProvider}, #{chainAttestStatus}, #{chainAttestAttempts}, #{chainAttestLastError}, #{chainConfirmedAt}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_party_ratio_waiver SET requested_ratio = #{requestedRatio}, party_pool_size = #{partyPoolSize}, total_eligible_size = #{totalEligibleSize}, reason_text = #{reasonText}, reason_evidence_keys = #{reasonEvidenceKeys}, status = #{status}, committee_approver = #{committeeApprover}, committee_approval_at = #{committeeApprovalAt}, committee_opinion = #{committeeOpinion}, street_approver = #{streetApprover}, street_approval_at = #{streetApprovalAt}, street_opinion = #{streetOpinion}, applied_at = #{appliedAt}, local_payload_hash = #{localPayloadHash}, local_payload_locked_at = #{localPayloadLockedAt}, blockchain_tx_hash = #{blockchainTxHash}, blockchain_chain_provider = #{blockchainChainProvider}, chain_attest_status = #{chainAttestStatus}, chain_attest_attempts = #{chainAttestAttempts}, chain_attest_last_error = #{chainAttestLastError}, chain_confirmed_at = #{chainConfirmedAt}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE waiver_id = #{waiverId} AND version = #{version}
